steps.title: Confirm Overview Ready State
steps.prompt: Verify the current observed dataset and summarize whether overview is in a true start-ready state for V4-B operational validation. Report observed sample count, same-surface count, policy pair count, and the current next priority in 3-5 lines.

steps.title: Confirm Surface Alignment
steps.prompt: Using the current observed dataset, verify whether overview / collected summary / decision surfaces still align on baseline_comparison_status, next_kpi_blocker, and next_priority_recommendation. Return only the alignment verdict and any mismatch.
